channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Nvidia earnings takeaways: Data center revenue nearly doubles, report is strong but stock slides
item.description: On the earnings call with analysts, CEO Jensen Huang explains the reason behind the chipmaker's reporting change.

item.title: SpaceX's historic IPO plans: Billions in losses and Musk's massive ownership
item.description: SpaceX filed for an IPO and plans to list on Nasdaq under ticker SPCX, according to its SEC prospectus.

item.title: Bezos defends billionaires, hypes AI, talks taxes and praises Trump in CNBC interview
item.description: Jeff Bezos rejected accusations that Amazon's decision to release a documentary on first lady Melania Trump was an effort to curry favor with the president.

item.title: Congress is best chance to stop Trump 'lawfare' fund, attorneys say
item.description: The Department of Justice has set up a $1.8 billion fund that will purportedly compensate victims of prosecutorial overreach under the Biden administration.

item.title: U.S. crude oil falls below $100 per barrel after Trump says Iran talks in final stages
item.description: Trump told reporters that the administration was in the "final stages" of negotiations with Iran, according to a pool report.

item.title: Why some investors are turning to high-yield bonds amid the volatility. Where to find opportunity
item.description: Rates recently took a leg higher across the fixed income market, but some investors see opportunity in high-yield bonds.

item.title: Intuit plans to cut workforce by about 17% as tax software maker reckons with slowing growth
item.description: Intuit's stock has been hammered this year as investors worry that generative artificial intelligence models could threaten software companies.

item.title: SpaceX is poised to be the biggest IPO ever. Here are the top U.S. deals to date
item.description: Before SpaceX's upcoming IPO sets an expected record, Alibaba, Facebook and Visa raised historic sums in the U.S.

item.title: E.l.f. Beauty to walk back some tariff price increases amid high gas prices and consumer 'suffering'
item.description: E.l.f. Beauty raised prices by $1 last August to offset the impact of tariffs. It's now planning to walk back some of that amid a consumer pullback.

item.title: Sinkhole shuts runway at LaGuardia Airport, delaying flights, Port Authority warns
item.description: The Port Authority said travelers should expect delays and cancellations, with thunderstorms expected also expected to roll in Wednesday.

item.title: Jeff Bezos says there is ‘no truth’ to the ‘buy borrow die’ tax strategy
item.description: The "buy, borrow, die" strategy refers to the practice of wealthy founders or investors borrowing against their assets and using the loan proceeds as income.

item.title: Bezos brushes off concerns of an AI bubble: 'You shouldn't worry about it'
item.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos shrugged off concerns of a looming AI bubble, saying the massive investments will ultimately drive the technology forward over time.

item.title: Jim Cramer says the world of tech investing has changed and it's not going back
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks have replaced software as the market's technology leaders.

item.title: OpenAI takes the lead in AI IPO horse race: 'Getting to public markets first is very important'
item.description: It comes after reports that the AI giant and ChatGPT owner is set to file confidentially for an IPO as soon as this week.

item.title: Ram unveils lineup of Hemi V-8 engine-powered 'muscle trucks' despite high gas prices
item.description: Stellantis plans to launch a new lineup of what it's calling "muscle trucks" for its Ram brand despite elevated U.S. gas prices due to the war in Iran.

item.title: OpenAI to confidentially file for IPO as soon as Friday: Source
item.description: OpenAI is working with banks including Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley.

item.title: DOJ charges ex-prosecutor with stealing Trump documents case report prepared by Jack Smith
item.description: Carmen Mercedes Lineberger allegedy emailed herself a copy of Volume II of special counsel Jack Smith's report on Trump's criminal case.

item.title: Mamdani fires back at Bezos over Queens teacher tax remark
item.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos called for eliminating federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners as Mamdani pushes a luxury second-home tax in New York City.

item.title: UAE says new pipeline that will bypass Strait of Hormuz is nearly 50% complete
item.description: The UAE has redirected some oil exports through an existing pipeline to Fujairah, which has a maximum capacity of 1.8 million barrels per day.

item.title: Fed officials see rate hike ahead if inflation stays elevated, minutes show
item.description: A majority of officials anticipated that interest rate increases would be necessary if the Iran war continued to aggravate inflation.

item.title: What Goldman’s lead role in SpaceX’s record-breaking IPO means for investors
item.description: It's a major win for Goldman's dealmaking division.

item.title: Considering the Chase Sapphire Reserve's 150,000-point bonus? Here are 4 easy-to-miss reasons it's a great deal
item.description: The Sapphire Reserve is more than just a big bonus. Carefully considering these factors can help you easily determine if it's a good fit for you.

item.title: House approves breakthrough housing bill in a win for investors
item.description: The U.S. House approved an updated housing affordability bill after removing industry-opposed requirements on selling build-to-rent homes.

item.title: Zuckerberg's Meta layoffs memo: 'Success isn't a given' in the AI era
item.description: Meta on Wednesday commenced its latest round of layoffs, which affect about 10% of the company's workforce or roughly 8,000 jobs.

item.title: Cheap AI could derail OpenAI and Anthropic's IPOs
item.description: Chinese AI labs are matching American frontier capability at a fraction of the cost.

item.title: Short sellers see opportunity as chip stocks rally breaks, bears hold firm into Nvidia earnings
item.description: Despite a pullback across semi shares in recent sessions, traders betting against some of the industry's biggest names have shown little sign of retreating.

item.title: Airbnb adds hotels, car rentals. Chesky says app can become an 'Amazon for services'
item.description: Airbnb on Wednesday added new services and independent hotels to its platform in its latest expansion move in the travel industry.

item.title: Crypto companies are trying to leave the hype cycle for a more disciplined phase, earnings show
item.description: Crypto companies spent years monetizing volatility. Now they're trying to survive without it.

item.title: Former Cuban President Raul Castro charged with murder in U.S.
item.description: The indictment comes as Trump pushes for a regime change in Cuba, where Castro's communists have been in charge since 1959 and the Fidel Castro-led revolution.

item.title: Jeff Bezos says bottom half of earners should pay zero in income taxes
item.description: Amazon Executive Chairman Jeff Bezos on Wednesday called for zero federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners.
